fields.description:
[Federation] Refactoring Yarn Router's Node Web Page.

The modified content is as follows:
1.Router's Node Web Page is more similar to RM's Node Web Page, showing Cluster Metrics, Cluster Nodes Metrics, Scheduler Metrics
2.The information of the cluster is displayed under the list
3. Display the relevant node information of the sub-cluster respectively, and display the information in the header

*The style before the page change is as follows:*

*!image-2022-10-05-17-31-01-780.png|width=765,height=280!*

*The style of the page after the change is as follows:*

*Enable Federation:*

*!image-2022-10-05-17-35-37-762.png|width=765,height=394!*

*!image-2022-10-05-17-37-20-718.png|width=765,height=320!*

*Not Enable Federation:*

*!image-2022-10-05-17-45-16-500.png|width=764,height=344!*

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
